note: Narrative profile — specific OHLC prices not cleanly read this pass

summary.shape_sentence: RTH opened with continuation pressure, sold hard into open flush, reversed sharply off session low, chopped midday under supply, late afternoon upside GOAT expansion broke through ceiling, closed near upper half.

goat.note: standout late afternoon upside drive breaking through ceiling from local base

time_markers.10am_blue: rebound mode post-flush; reactive not yet trend-accepted
time_markers.12pm_red: lunch rotation, not continuation; capped by supply, sideways-choppy
time_markers.2pm_green: structure improving; basing preparing for expansion
time_markers.4pm_yellow: session closed after late upside drive; close held gains

takeaway: Classic opening-flush-failure-into-late-session-recovery profile. Early weakness real but did not sustain after cash-open washout. Midday was rotation/patience, not trend-chase. Best trade locations: (1) opening flush reversal, (2) late afternoon base-to-breakout (GOAT). Reference model: when strong early selloff fails to make continued lows and midday compresses under supply, watch for late expansion through ceiling. Supply respected first, then vulnerable after repeated tests without fresh downside acceptance.
